pageContext.name: Ren
pageContext.description: The Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures of Ren Hoek and Stimpson J. Cat are once again available! Bask in the glory of their detailed sculpting, interchangeable heads & hands, and awesome accessories, and weep no more. Bring some Happy, Happy, Joy, Joy into your life and secure these made-to-order 7 scale Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures- don't be an EEDIOT and miss out on them!  Who doesn't love the violently psychotic Chihuahua that is Ren Hoek? Fun fact: he doesn't shake because he's scared or cold- he shakes because he's barely able to control his inexhaustible rage, YOU EEDIOT! This 7 scale highly articulated Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure of Ren Hoek features premium sculpting and decoration, interchangeable heads & hands, as well as a number of detailed accessories. We know that owning this made-to-order Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figure may not be for everyone, because most people are super-lame, but not YOU! You are one of the special ones who knows that if you don't have the Ren & Stimpy ULTIMATES! figures in your collection, you might as well not have a collection at all!
